headline: Yuan Strengthens to 91-Day High Amid Policy Focus on Domestic Consumption and Trade
headline_zh: 人民币升至91日高位，政策聚焦内需与贸易
narrative: The yuan closed at 6.76 against the dollar, its strongest in three months, as Beijing rolled out a coordinated policy push to boost domestic demand. The Ministry of Commerce led eight departments in a plan to integrate railway and tourism, while also announcing anti-dumping duties on copolymers from Korea, Thailand and Malaysia and tightening export controls on precursor chemicals. These moves signal a strategic pivot toward consumption-led growth and self-reliance, even as the World Cup viewership surges, a reminder of the vast domestic market. Separately, Xi Jinping's visit to the Sino-Korean Friendship Tower in Pyongyang reinforces alliance diplomacy, while heavy rain warnings for the south pose near-term economic risks.
narrative_zh: 人民币兑美元收于6.76，创三个月新高，与此同时北京出台一系列政策提振内需。商务部牵头八部门推动铁路旅游融合，并对韩国、泰国、马来西亚共聚聚甲醛征收反倾销税，收紧易制毒化学品出口管制。这些举措指向消费驱动增长和自主可控的战略转向，而世界杯收视率飙升则印证了庞大的国内市场。此外，习近平参谒中朝友谊塔强化了同盟外交，南方强降雨预警则带来短期经济风险。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4031.513 ▲0.54% · Shenzhen Component 14963.407 ▼2.00% · ChiNext 3830.353 ▲0.50% · USD/CNY 6.7611 ▼0.21% · USD/CNH 6.762 ▼0.01%

deviations.title: USD/CNY
deviations.note: USD/CNY at 6.76 is a 91-day low (prior min 6.76)
